PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\rahul.mehta\\Downloads" -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'reddit|block|focus|freedom|leech|hosts|cold.?turkey|stayfocus|self.?control|productiv' } | Select-Object FullName, Mode, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($statePath = "$env:ProgramData\\FocusBlocker\\state.json"; if \(Test-Path $statePath\) { Get-Content $statePath -Raw } else { "No state.json found at $statePath — blocker may not be installed, or installed under a different path." })

PowerShell($hosts = Get-Content "$env:SystemRoot\\System32\\drivers\\etc\\hosts"; $start = $hosts | Select-String -Pattern 'FocusBlocker Managed Block Start' | Select-Object -First 1; $end = $hosts | Select-String -Pattern 'FocusBlocker Managed Block End' | Select-Object -First 1; if \($start -and $end\) { $hosts[\($start.LineNumber-1\)..\($end.LineNumber-1\)] } else { "No managed block found in hosts file." })
